generated.findings: Patchy right base airspace disease, stable bilateral calcified granulomas/lymph, and a bullet in the posterior soft tissues of the left chest wall. Vague density in the right mid lung, possibly related to scapular tip and superimposed ribs.

ground_truth.findings: Heart size within normal limits. Negative for focal pulmonary consolidation, pleural effusion, or pneumothorax. Mild levocurvature of thoracic spine. A 9 mm pulmonary nodule is noted partially overlying the posterior 6th right rib on the frontal view.
